name: ClickUp
description: ClickUp is an all-in-one project management and productivity platform. It provides a REST API to manage workspaces, spaces, folders, lists, tasks, and comments. Supports rich task features like custom fields, time tracking, dependencies, and automations.

capabilities.name: create_task
capabilities.description: Create a new task in a list with title, description, assignees, priority, due date, and custom fields.

capabilities.name: get_tasks
capabilities.description: Retrieve tasks from a list with filtering by status, assignee, due date, and more.

capabilities.name: update_task
capabilities.description: Update properties of an existing task such as name, status, priority, or assignees.

capabilities.name: create_list
capabilities.description: Create a new list in a folder or as a folderless list in a space.

capabilities.name: get_spaces
capabilities.description: Retrieve all spaces in a workspace/team, including their settings and enabled features.

capabilities.name: create_comment
capabilities.description: Add a comment to a task, with support for mentions and rich text formatting.
